response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack developer with broad web, mobile, and some systems experience, but he falls well short of the core minimum qualifications for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ programming; his C++ exposure is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments plus a bachelor thesis project. His systems-level work is primarily in DLang, and his recent career trajectory (TypeScript/Node.js product work) points away from cloud compute platform engineering. He also shows no formal technical-leadership experience managing cross-team priorities or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the scale this role demands.
strengths: High-throughput, low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong software craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and community teaching/workshops
Long-running ownership of an open-source geo-data platform deployed on Kubernetes
concerns: Far below the required 8 years of C++ experience (under 1 year professionally)
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure architecture ownership
No formal technical-leadership track record leading strategy, priorities, and cross-team alignment

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud platform leadership experience
